tabs.name: Victoria
tabs.notes: First remote tab only. Nikolai, WSL, and Termux remain disabled until Victoria passes hermes-grid --check.

tabs.name: Nikolai
tabs.notes: Validated WSL workstation/GPU-capable engineering persona candidate. Keep disabled until explicit enablement after check/probe/dry-run gates pass.

tabs.name: Android
tabs.notes: High-priority mobile edge candidate. Blocked until SSH/Termux transport, wrapper, tmux/session policy, power/network behavior, and safety contract are discovered.

tabs.name: Termux
tabs.notes: Android/Termux runtime candidate. Blocked until phone-local Hermes, SSH server, tmux/session wrapper, and battery/network constraints are documented.
